atomic_task: Put the grabbed green cube into the yellow box
plan_brief: Detect the yellow target box, estimate a safe placement pose inside the yellow box, move to the placement pose, open the gripper to release the green cube, retreat upward, then return to the global observation pose.
program:
debug("Starting placement task of putting green cube into yellow box")
yellow_box = detect_object_by_text("yellow box")
debug("Successfully detected yellow target box")
place_pose = estimate_place_pose(yellow_box)
debug("Estimated valid placement pose inside yellow box")
move_to_pose(place_pose)
debug("Reached placement pose, opening gripper to release cube")
open_gripper()
debug("Successfully released cube, retreating upward")
retreat()
debug("Returning to global observation pose")
return_to_observe_pose()
result = True
